title: ANALYTICAL APPLICATIONS OF DUTOIT'S THERMOVOLUMETRY. PART II. ANALYSIS OF ZINC IN BRASS
author: KUMAR KRISHNA CHATTERJI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The thermometric method has been applied in the estimation of Cu and Zn by titration with (NH 4 O 2 Hg(CNS) 4 . Zn in presence of Cu and in brass has been est mated using the same reagent after removing Cu from the solution as Cu 2 (CNS) 2  by adding NH 4 CNS and H 2 SO 3.  The method provides results for Zn which are usually +  \(I\) % higher than those obtained by gravimetric estimation as NH 4 ZnPO 4 .
steps_raw: The thermometric method has been applied in the estimation of Cu and Zn by titration with (NH 4 O 2 Hg(CNS) 4 . The method provides results for Zn which are usually +  \(I\) % higher than those obtained by gravimetric estimation as NH 4 ZnPO 4 .
